prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-PORTABLETOILETSEAT-BLK-FBA Product Type: TOILET_SEAT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Camping Toilet, 5 Gallon Bucket Portable Toilet Seat with Lid, Camping Essentials Emergency Preparedness Items, Black Description: When you gotta go, you gotta go!

We all know the feeling, and when you’re away from modern conveniences, this portable toilet seat with lid is the perfect solution. So, grab a leaf and get comfy, this luggable loo is the camping essentials item you didn’t know you needed until now, adding comfort and convenience to your campsite.

The toilet seat with lid has been designed to seamlessly snap on to the top rim of a standard 3.5 or 5 gallon bucket not only for portability sake, but to help avoid messy leaks or spills. The toilet seat also features a built in notch where the lid can close or snap down completely, ensuring contents are and remain contained.

The portable toilet seat with lid is also a practical item to consider packing with your emergency preparedness items, natural disaster survival kit, bug out bag, prepper supplies and more. In the event of an emergency, you’ll never be without somewhere to go with this reliable tool.

Pack this lightweight portable toilet seat with lid come your next backcountry wilderness camping trip, family road trip, or as mentioned, include it with your survival gear. The durable polypropylene material seat with lid makes for a comfortable bathroom experience, even on your wildest outdoor adventure! And, on the plus side, you’ll get to avoid that terrifying looking outhouse, while enjoy the stunning views that nature has to offer first hand.

Dimensions: 14.5 x 13.5 x 1.5 inches

Product Weight: 1.04lbs

Note: 5 gallon bucket NOT included with purchase Search Terms: Natural disaster survival kit emergency preparedness items road trip camping essentials portable toilet seat with lid hiking camping outdoor gear wilderness survival gear and supplies camp toilet portable boating accessories toilet seat Features: - NOTE: BUCKET NOT INCLUDED - PORTABLE TOILET SEAT WITH LID: Pack this snap on toilet seat for backcountry camping trips, with boating accessories or just anywhere you need a luggable loo; durable polypropylene material seat with lid makes for a comfortable bathroom experience, even on your wildest outdoor adventure - COMPATIBLE WITH 5 GALLON BUCKET: Portable, snap on toilet seat lid has been intentionally designed to fit tightly and seamlessly on top of a standard 5 gallon bucket rim; this makes for excellent portability and to also helps to avoid messy spills or leaks - CAMPING ESSENTIAL: Include this portable toilet seat with lid with your hiking, backpacking or camping gear, or anywhere you know you’ll be away from modern conveniences; lightweight design, weighing in at just over a pound, this snap on toilet seat won’t weight you or your outdoor gear down - NATURAL DISASTER SURVIVAL KIT: An item you may have thought not to include with your survival gear or emergency preparedness items, pack this portable toilet seat with lid with a 5 gallon bucket and you’ll never be without somewhere to go in the event of an emergency === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Portable Toilet Seat with Lid, Black

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Portable Toilet Seat With Lid

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fits 5 Gallon Bucket, Emergency Preparedness, Camping Essentials, Lightweight Polypropylene, Snap-On Design

openai.title_differentiation: Fits 5 Gallon Buckets, Snap On Lid, Lightweight Polypropylene, Leak Resistant, Emergency Preparedness
